name: 2pc 18"x24" Vertical Vintage Tree Wall Art Set - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Complete your indoor decor with the 2-Piece 18"x24" Vertical Vintage Tree Wall Art Set from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. The vertical wall art set features a striking vintage tree poster print on paper, set in a black frame, adding a touch of sophistication to your walls. Easy to display with a D-ring back, this framed art set is a stylish addition to any room in your house.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
